sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_pi (id Int32, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_pi (id, value) VALUES (1, pi()), (2, pi() * 2);
UPDATE test_pi SET value = value + pi() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, value * pi() AS value_with_pi FROM test_pi;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_pi WHERE value > pi();
